import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch_geometric.nn import GINEConv, global_mean_pool, BatchNorm


class GINEVirtualNode(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_node_features=9, num_edge_features=3, hidden_dim=300,
                 num_layers=5, num_tasks=128, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_layers = num_layers
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim
        self.dropout = dropout

        # Node embedding
        self.node_emb = nn.Linear(num_node_features, hidden_dim)
        # Edge embedding
        self.edge_emb = nn.Linear(num_edge_features, hidden_dim)

        # Virtual node
        self.vn_emb = nn.Embedding(1, hidden_dim)
        self.vn_mlp_list = nn.ModuleList()

        # GINE layers
        self.convs = nn.ModuleList()
        self.bns = nn.ModuleList()
        self.vn_convs = nn.ModuleList()

        for i in range(num_layers):
            nn1 = nn.Sequential(
                nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
                nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),
                nn.ReLU(),
                nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
                nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),
                nn.ReLU(),
            )
            self.convs.append(GINEConv(nn1, train_eps=True, edge_dim=hidden_dim))
            self.bns.append(BatchNorm(hidden_dim))

            # Virtual node MLP
            self.vn_mlp_list.append(nn.Sequential(
                nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 2 * hidden_dim),
                nn.BatchNorm1d(2 * hidden_dim),
                nn.ReLU(),
                nn.Linear(2 * hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
                nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),
                nn.ReLU(),
            ))

        # Output head
        self.pool = global_mean_pool
        self.head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_tasks),
        )

    def forward(self, x, edge_index, edge_attr, batch):
        # Embed
        x = self.node_emb(x.float())
        edge_attr = self.edge_emb(edge_attr.float())

        # Virtual node
        vn = self.vn_emb(torch.zeros(batch[-1].item() + 1, dtype=torch.long, device=x.device))

        for i in range(self.num_layers):
            # Add virtual node info to nodes
            vn_expand = vn[batch]
            x = x + vn_expand

            # GINE conv
            x = self.convs[i](x, edge_index, edge_attr)
            x = self.bns[i](x)
            x = nn.functional.relu(x)
            x = nn.functional.dropout(x, p=self.dropout, training=self.training)

            # Update virtual node
            vn_pool = global_mean_pool(x, batch)
            vn = vn + self.vn_mlp_list[i](vn_pool)

        # Graph-level pooling
        x = self.pool(x, batch)
        out = self.head(x)
        return out
